name: Goat Cheese, Bacon and Pine Nut Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 slice of bacon, cooked until crisp, drained
1/2 cup pine nuts, toasted lightly and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mash together the goat cheese, bacon, and scallion greens.
2. Form level teaspoons of the mixture into balls. If the mixture is too soft to form, chill it for 10 minutes.
3. Coat the balls with the pine nuts, pressing the nuts into the mixture.
4. Chill them for 20 minutes.
Makes about 12 bites, 2 servings.
